texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: SELECTIVITY & PERMEABILITY
texts.text: SELECTIVITY & PERMEABILITY

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: MENU
texts.text: MENU

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For industrial applicaƟon, a membrane must offer SELECTIVITY, so there is a separaƟon, and PERMEABILITY, so the required membrane area is not too large.
texts.text: For industrial applicaƟon, a membrane must offer SELECTIVITY, so there is a separaƟon, and PERMEABILITY, so the required membrane area is not too large.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: There is oŌen a trade-off between these two properƟes.
texts.text: There is oŌen a trade-off between these two properƟes.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: FLUX
texts.text: FLUX

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Flux, J , is the amount of permeate that passes through a certain membrane area in a given Ɵme.
texts.text: Flux, J , is the amount of permeate that passes through a certain membrane area in a given Ɵme.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It may be expressed in units such as mol m -2  s -1 or kg m -2 h -1 .
texts.text: It may be expressed in units such as mol m -2  s -1 or kg m -2 h -1 .

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For a pressure-driven process such as gas separaƟon, the flux depends on the difference in pressure across the membrane.
texts.text: For a pressure-driven process such as gas separaƟon, the flux depends on the difference in pressure across the membrane.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PERMEANCE
texts.text: PERMEANCE

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Permeance is flux divided by pressure difference.
texts.text: Permeance is flux divided by pressure difference.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Permeance depends on membrane thickness.
texts.text: Permeance depends on membrane thickness.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PERMEABILITY
texts.text: PERMEABILITY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Permeability, P , is permeance mulƟplied by membrane thickness.
texts.text: Permeability, P , is permeance mulƟplied by membrane thickness.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: SELECTIVITY
texts.text: SELECTIVITY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The selecƟvity of a membrane is oŌen expressed as a raƟo of permeabiliƟes.
texts.text: The selecƟvity of a membrane is oŌen expressed as a raƟo of permeabiliƟes.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: SEPARATION FACTOR
texts.text: SEPARATION FACTOR

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The ability of a membrane to concentrate up a component of a mixture may be expressed in terms of a separaƟon factor.
texts.text: The ability of a membrane to concentrate up a component of a mixture may be expressed in terms of a separaƟon factor.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You may come across unusual units that are used for historical reasons.
texts.text: You may come across unusual units that are used for historical reasons.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For example, the amount of a gas is oŌen expressed in units of cm 3  [STP], which is the volume (in cm 3 ) that would be occupied by that amount of an ideal gas at standard temperature and pressure (STP).
texts.text: For example, the amount of a gas is oŌen expressed in units of cm 3  [STP], which is the volume (in cm 3 ) that would be occupied by that amount of an ideal gas at standard temperature and pressure (STP).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: STP is defined by IUPAC as 0 ° C, 1 bar (before 1982 it was 0 ° C, 1 atm).
texts.text: STP is defined by IUPAC as 0 ° C, 1 bar (before 1982 it was 0 ° C, 1 atm).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Gas permeance is oŌen expressed in gas permeaƟon units (GPU).
texts.text: Gas permeance is oŌen expressed in gas permeaƟon units (GPU).

texts.label: formula
texts.orig: 1 GPU = 10 -6  cm 3  [STP] cm -2 s -1  cmHg -1 = 3.348×10 -10  mol m -2  s -1 Pa -1

texts.label: text
texts.orig: When calculaƟng permeance in GPU the pressure difference is in cmHg (1 bar = 10 5  Pa = 75 cmHg).
texts.text: When calculaƟng permeance in GPU the pressure difference is in cmHg (1 bar = 10 5  Pa = 75 cmHg).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Gas permeability is oŌen expressed in units of barrer.
texts.text: Gas permeability is oŌen expressed in units of barrer.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 1 barrer
texts.text: 1 barrer

texts.label: formula
texts.orig: = 10 -10  cm 3  [STP] cm cm -2  s -1 cmHg -1 = 3.35×10 -16  mol m m -2  s -1  Pa -1

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If permeance in GPU is mulƟplied by thickness in µm you get permeability in barrer.
texts.text: If permeance in GPU is mulƟplied by thickness in µm you get permeability in barrer.
